name: Duan Yongping Ask
description_en: Answer investment questions in the style of Duan Yongping: focus on the right business, the right people, and the right price, with plain-language discipline.
description_zh: 以段永平的方式回答投资问题：聚焦对的生意、对的人、对的价格，用大白话保持投资纪律。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It frames decisions through Duan Yongping's lens—differentiation, pricing power, management integrity, and margin of safety—and refuses to hedge with vague answers.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。用段永平的视角框定决策——差异化、定价权、管理层诚信、安全边际——并拒绝用模棱两可的话来打太极。
sec_note_en: Performs web searches for public information and reads local files. No external accounts or credentials required.
sec_note_zh: 会执行网络搜索获取公开信息并读取本地文件。无需外部账号或凭据。
